ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., quarterback, running back) */,
  "player_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "player_height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "player_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "player_position_detail" TEXT /* Detailed position (e.g., quarterback, running back, wide receiver) */,
  "player_college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "player_draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "player_draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted */,
  "player_draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Current status (e.g., active, injured, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is located */,
  "team_mascot" TEXT /* Mascot of the team */,
  "team_founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_coach" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "team_owner" TEXT /* Name of the team owner */,
  "team_conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., NFC, AFC) */,
  "team_division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., East, West) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week number of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the away team */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Location of the game (e.g., home, away) */,
  "game_attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "game_weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "game_referee" TEXT /* Name of the head referee */,
  "game_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the game in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passing_statistics" (
  "passing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passing statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "passing_comp" INTEGER /* Number of passing completions */,
  "passing_att" INTEGER /* Number of passing attempts */,
  "passing_yard" INTEGER /* Number of passing yards */,
  "passing_td" INTEGER /* Number of passing touchdowns */,
  "passing_int" INTEGER /* Number of passing interceptions */,
  "passing_long" INTEGER /* Longest passing play */,
  "passing_sacks" INTEGER /* Number of sacks */,
  "passing_sacked_yards" INTEGER /* Yards lost due to sacks */,
  "passing_fumbles" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles */,
  "passing_fumbles_lost" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles lost */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passing_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passing_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rushing_statistics" (
  "rushing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rushing statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "rushing_att" INTEGER /* Number of rushing attempts */,
  "rushing_yard" INTEGER /* Number of rushing yards */,
  "rushing_td" INTEGER /* Number of rushing touchdowns */,
  "rushing_long" INTEGER /* Longest rushing play */,
  "rushing_fumbles" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles */,
  "rushing_fumbles_lost" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles lost */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rushing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rushing_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rushing_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opponents" (
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opponent */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game the opponent belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the opponent belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "opponent_score" INTEGER /* Score of the opponent */,
  "opponent_result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., win, loss, tie) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opponent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_opponents_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_opponents_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team that plays in the stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the stadium is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the stadium is located */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "stadium_surface" TEXT /* Surface type of the stadium (e.g., grass, artificial turf) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stadiums_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weeks" (
  "week_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each week */,
  "week_number" INTEGER /* Number of the week */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the week */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the week */,
  "week_type" TEXT /* Type of week (e.g., regular season, playoffs) */,
  "week_name" TEXT /* Name of the week (e.g., Week 1, Wild Card Weekend) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("week_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weeks_week_number FOREIGN KEY ("week_number") REFERENCES games ("week")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "user_first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "user_last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "user_created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "user_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
